turns.question: preference_induction
turns.hypothesis: small, portable electronics with minimal power requirements go to the side drawer
turns.answer: Upright reading and reference books go to the bookshelf — fragile display pieces and delicate drinkware also go there. Shared tabletop leisure, display, and catchall items go to the center table.

turns.question: preference_induction
turns.hypothesis: small, battery-powered electronics with minimal power requirements go to the side drawer
turns.answer: Large wired entertainment devices and plug-in media equipment go to the TV stand. Stored, seasonal, or archived living-room accessories go to the storage basket. Upright reading and reference books, along with fragile display pieces and delicate drinkware, go to the bookshelf. Shared tabletop leisure, display, and catchall items go to the center table. Small entertainment and personal electronics go to the side drawer.
